reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los empleados, pero le falta un lugar donde poder comprar (café, gaseosas, golosinas,etc).

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the employees, but it lacks a place to buy things (coffee, soda, candy, etc.).

reviews.comment:
No le pongo cero estrellas porque no se puede. Tienen los baños inhabilitados. Necesitaba cambiarme y ni para eso. La verdad despues de un viaje largo recibir esa negatividad. Deja mucho que desear.

(Translated by Google)
I'd give it zero stars if I could. The bathrooms are out of order. I needed to change, and they couldn't even do that. Honestly, after a long trip, receiving such negativity leaves much to be desired.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2cU1TX2t3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El lugar es muy lindo pero casi no hay beneficios para los SOCIOS ... prácticamente da lo mismo ser socio q no... ni descuento para un familiar...hay q pagar x la pileta

(Translated by Google)
The place is very nice, but there are almost no benefits for members... it's practically the same whether you're a member or not... not even a discount for a family member... you have to pay for the pool.
